entities.description: The measure of agricultural output or resource efficiency

entities.description: The ability to maintain resource levels for future use

entities.name: WATERSHED
entities.description: A natural hydraulic entity where water flows in a definite path to a common point

entities.name: LAND USE PLANNING
entities.description: The process of regulating and planning the use of land within a watershed

entities.description: The process of identifying and analyzing soil properties for land use planning

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY STATUS
entities.description: The status of soil nutrients and properties that affect productivity

entities.name: GIS
entities.description: Geographic Information System tool used for spatial analysis of soil fertility

entities.name: SPATIAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of analyzing soil fertility for a desired geographical area using GIS
